title: SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER LOCATOR - 211info
text: GET READY ROGUE SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on warming centers during a severe weather event. May offer additional warming resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Warming centers operate during the winter months and during severe weather advisories. Locations are open either throughout the winter season or when temperature thresholds are met. Email (541) 774-6790 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 774-6790 Emergency Management Office Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Community Shelters Extreme Cold Warming Centers Extreme Weather Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - COLD WEATHER INFORMATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
